'''Dretti Grond''' was a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] [[Swoop racing/Legends|racer]] who served as a member of [[Team Millennium Holos]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="HNN" />
